name: Brittingham Midtown Community Center
description: Come play pickleball at Brittingham Midtown Community Center in Newport News, VA! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.

name: Christopher Newport University
description: One court available to students only.

name: Denbigh Community Center
description: Please call the front desk to verify courts are available. Select days and times are available as it is a multipurpose gym. Please call to confirm when they are offering it.
fees: Members only — $15 annual fee for non-Newport News residents under 50 years old. Free for residents and those 50 and up

name: Hampton Roads Pickleball Club
description: Hampton Roads Pickleball Club is a place to play pickleball in Newport News, VA. There are 8 indoor acrylic, carpet, and concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts can be reserved. A membership is required to play. Amenities include lights, restrooms, trainers or lessons, wheelchair accessibility, a pro shop or equipment store, youth programming, and food.
open_play_schedule: Open play daily. Lessons and court reservations available.
fees: Members only — Open play requires at least a Free Daily Membership with a $20 drop in fee. Monthly memberships available with discounted open play fees.

name: HR SportspleX
description: Come play pickleball at HR SportspleX in Newport News, VA! There are 5 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. You can reserve the courts. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Huntington Park Tennis Center
description: The courts are open from around sunrise to 9pm daily. Locker rooms, bathrooms and drink vending machine are only available during the main building's operating hours. Hours are posted on the front door. Reservations for special events only may be made by contacting the facility's manager at onofftm@nnva.gov. $6/hour/court fee may apply.

name: James River Country Club
description: James River Country Club is a place to play pickleball in Newport News, VA. There are 4 indoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and trainers or lessons. A membership is required to play.

name: Kiln Creek Golf Club and Resort
description: The Kiln Creek pickleball courts are private for Kiln Creek residents and golf club members. Gate access code is required for entry.

name: Kiln Creek HOA
description: The Kiln Creek HOA courts are private for Kiln Creek residents and their guests. A gate access code or key is required for entry. A membership for non-residents may be offered in the future.

name: Warwick Yacht and Country Club
description: Warwick Yacht and Country Club is a place to play pickleball in Newport News, VA. There are 8 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. Reservations are not available.
